title: Practice initialization forms
prompt_md:
## Goal

Declare several integer variables using different initialization styles, then print a computed result.

## Input

None — this program takes no input.

## Output

Print a single integer on its own line: `a + b - c` where `a` is `10`, `b` is `20`, and `c` is `15` (should be `15`).

Declare `a` with **copy initialization**, `b` with **direct initialization**, `c` and `result` with **brace initialization**. The `std::cout` line is provided — just make sure `result` holds the right value.

title: Swap two variables and print the difference
prompt_md:
## Goal

Declare two integer variables, swap their values using a temporary variable, then print the difference.

## Input

None — this program takes no input.

## Output

Print a single integer on its own line: `y - x` after swapping `x` (initially `50`) and `y` (initially `30`). The output should be `20`.

The `std::cout` line is provided — swap `x` and `y` before it runs.
